nodes.label: Email Confirmation Preview
nodes.description: Email template preview for PromptLabzz account confirmation. Shows the cat mascot logo at top, title 'Confirme seu email', personalized greeting to 'Ana', instruction to confirm email for login/progress/personalized trails. Includes a 'Ação segura' (Safe Action) note, a green 'Confirmar email' CTA button, fallback URL (https://app4.seudominio.com/confirm-email), and a note to ignore if account was not created.
